sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَ المُدِيرُ عَنْ رِحْلَةٍ مَدْرَسِيَّةٍ إِلَى الحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je objavio školski izlet u park.
sentences.translationEn: The principal announced a school trip to the park.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الطُّلَّابُ كَثِيرًا عِنْدَمَا سَمِعُوا الخَبَرَ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su se jako obradovali kad su čuli vijest.
sentences.translationEn: The students were very happy when they heard the news.

sentences.translation: Ukrcali su se u autobus i pjevali na putu.
sentences.translationEn: They boarded the bus and sang on the way.

sentences.arabic: لَعِبُوا فِي الحَدِيقَةِ وَأَكَلُوا الغَدَاءَ هُنَاكَ.
sentences.translation: Igrali su se u parku i tamo ručali.
sentences.translationEn: They played in the park and ate lunch there.

sentences.translation: Vratili su se u školu veseli i umorni.
sentences.translationEn: They returned to school happy and tired.
